creator: flash@hway.ru
text:
Driver is not working even with one board installed 'cause of a typo
	in the initialization code.

Fix: Here is a patch for FreeBSD-current as of 970603.
	The problem also known to exist in 2.1.7, 2.2.1, 2.2.2

How-To-Repeat: 	Install the board and try to use it. Link goes down after ifconfig.
